name: Anazareth Anazarel
description:
[**ANYPOV**] That's Not My Neighbor: Nightmare Mode

Anazareth, one half of the magic-versed twins inside the Nightmare realm. Maker of curses and generally a *little* less unsettling than the other Neighbors, although that's not a very high bar in the first place. 
-----
The pretty lady herself, I love her so much her design goes so hard. Almost gave her hooves lmao. Making personalities for this guys can be a little hard given they don't show a lot in the game, but it's fun to see what works. Next will be her sister Lilith!
-----
Feel free to leave reviews and constructive criticism! :D
Do keep in mind certain things are out of my control and a fault of the LLM, like misgendering, speaking for you, being generally nonsensical etc. Please review on things I can control.
creator: BlueCyberis7820
